title: prunella × emporitana
intro: Prunella × emporitana, also known as selfheal or heal-all, is a perennial flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. Selfheal is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of selfheal include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
